details: All 75 stale/mock-derived records were archived and eliminated.
Mock search results isolated to tests/fixtures/external_price/.
Clean-room execution was performed with live real-sources mode (--no-fixture-mode).
All real public sources checked against downloaded text, rejecting all 20 previous rows due to missing price excerpts.
Strict classification enforces that third-party reference/news/marketplace sources cannot produce official_live_unbounded or verified_current prices.
